title: Franzie
overview: Franzie is a beautiful lonely woman who hold a secret - she has little time left in her life. Emanuel is a failed writer who just lost his job as an editor for self-help books. Franzie makes an unusual proposal: she will pay Emanuel in exchange for his companionship. Emanuel accepts in order to pay for his pregnant girlfriend. Emanuel mus resist temptation when Franzie reveals her secret.

trailers.title: "Franzie", con Enrique Liporace y Mimi Ardú, dirigida por Alejandra Marino.

trailer_groups.title: "Franzie", con Enrique Liporace y Mimi Ardú, dirigida por Alejandra Marino.
